title.en: How to work and build with AI

description.en: From the very basics of what AI is, to how to communicate with AI, to how to build software using AI — all from the CS146S course at Stanford University.
description.zh-TW: 從最基礎的AI是什麼，到如何與AI溝通，到如何用AI打造軟體。來自史丹佛的CS146S課程。

title.en: How to use local model on Apple's device
title.zh-TW: 如何在Apple裝置上使用本地模型

description.en: An introduction to the Apple's MLX framework. How to use it to run local model on Apple's device.
description.zh-TW: 介紹Apple的MLX框架，如何利用他在Apple裝置上運行本地模型。

description.en: Reliable patterns for writing prompts that are easier to test, debug, and iterate.
description.zh-TW: 讓提示詞更容易測試、除錯與迭代的可靠設計模式。

title.en: Create ML and Core ML overview
title.zh-TW: Create ML 與 Core ML 介紹

description.en: Learn how Apple machine learning tools fit into on-device app experiences.
description.zh-TW: 了解 Apple 機器學習工具如何支援裝置端應用體驗。

description.en: Official references for Swift, SwiftUI, iOS frameworks, and platform APIs.
description.zh-TW: Swift、SwiftUI、iOS Framework 與平台 API 的官方參考文件。

description.en: Free NLP and transformer learning resources with practical notebooks and projects.
description.zh-TW: 免費的 NLP 與 Transformer 學習資源，含實作 notebook 與專案。
